pack.title: B.E.S.T - Better Enhanced Simple TV (Update)
pack.description:
# 🎣 Introducing the *B.E.S.T* Collection 😉 

**One-click installation. 👌**

- **B**etter Posters
- **E**nhanced with AIOMetadata
 - **S**imple, not complicated
- **T**V 📺

Includes:
- Trending Shows
- Trending Movies
- Popular Shows
- Popular Movies
- Top Rated
- Coming Soon Shows
- Coming Soon Movies
- Franchises
- Streaming (*Shows & Movies*)
- UK TV
- Genres
- Decades
- Directors


Discussion / Support :- https://www.reddit.com/r/Nuvio/s/9WvAf63JDp

**Torbox Referral link**
https://torbox.app/subscription?referral=de40af80-863e-4384-aa47-7699c11a286c

**When you use someone's referral code:**

*You* (the referred user) receive an extra 7 days times the number of months purchased added to the plan you purchased.

The other person (the referrer) receives an extra 7 days times the number of months purchased added to their current plan.
